atomic_facts.fact: The video transitions from a title screen to a creator's note.
The title screen displays the text 'BASIC TUTORIAL How to Draw HANDS'.
Red circles highlight the hands of the male and female characters.
The creator's note states the video is a lighthearted guide rather than a technical anatomical tutorial.
The note is signed with 'XOXO' and a drawing of a bunny face.

ocr: There are plenty of serious art books and tutorials out there that teach you the 100% anatomically correct technical way to draw super realistic hands. This is not one of them.
This video is meant as a lighthearted guide of methods I've picked up over the years on how to draw the difficult body parts at the end of our wrists!
